summary: Core single-page marketing site structure is implemented (TopNav + sections + Footer), with scroll navigation, a hero CTA, reveal/parallax animations with reduced-motion handling, services/testimonials/contact content sourced from local content modules, and the provided logo file referenced in header/hero/footer. However, some BuildRequest-required image assets are not evidenced as used, and there is unrequested footer attribution/back-end scaffolding.

missing_requirements.requirement: Use the provided set of 7 minimalist service icons (services-icons-sprite.dim_1024x1024.png) for the Services section in a cohesive style.
missing_requirements.reason: Services icons are implemented via lucide-react icons mapped in ServiceIcon, with no evidence of using the required local sprite asset.

missing_requirements.requirement: Use the provided soft geometric section divider/shape graphic (section-shapes.dim_1600x400.png) to support section transitions/backgrounds using local static assets.
missing_requirements.reason: Only the hero background image is referenced; there is no evidence that the required section divider/shape asset is present or used anywhere in the shown files.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer includes a 'Built with ❤️ using caffeine.ai' promotional attribution link.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested in the BuildRequest requirements or acceptance criteria.
BuildRequest is for a loading-free static marketing site with no backend CMS/database; adding backend scaffolding was not requested.
